name: Vegetable Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a skillet.
2. Add the minced garlic and diced onion to the hot oil. Sauté for 3 minutes until fragrant.
3. Add the diced green pepper, celery stalks, carrots, and mushrooms to the skillet. Continue sautéing for an additional 5 minutes until vegetables are tender.
4. Season the vegetable mixture well with herbs (parsley), spices (cayenne pepper), tamari, salt, and pepper.
5. In a bowl, combine the mashed potatoes, soy milk, orange juice, and salt to create a smooth batter.
6. Gradually add the whole wheat flour to the potato mixture until it forms a moist, pliable dough.
7. Roll out the dough on a floured surface into a rectangle large enough to fold over itself when placed in a casserole dish.
8. Place the rolled dough in a rectangular casserole dish so that the edges hang over the sides.
9. Spoon the sautéed vegetables into the center of the dough, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
10. Fold the excess dough over the vegetables to seal the loaf, moistening any exposed edges with water or additional oil to prevent drying during baking.
11. Grease a cookie sheet or place the assembled loaf directly in the casserole dish, oiled as needed, and bake for 40 minutes at 375°F (190°C).
12. Serve with side dishes such as mashed turnip, peas, beans, or cabbage.
